weapons.Name: Spinal Mass Annihilator
weapons.Rule: If damage from this weapon or any Crippling Effect it would cause would destroy a ship, remove that ship from the game without rolling for Explosion.

rules.Name: Engine Refit
rules.Text: This Ship may take an Engine Refit for +45 points, increasing its Thrust by 2".

flavour: The Drake class was the first human vessel to mount an apocalypse-grade, non-nuclear weapon: the Spinal Mass Annihilator. It is an enormous kinetic energy weapon capable of driving a house-sized lump of tungsten carbide coated, ultra-dense metal clean through a battleship, lengthwise. Such a weapon required enlarged power cores aboard the twinned Old Battleships and the new central core to feed it, necessitating the loss of its broadsides. Secondary armaments include NC-16 missile turrets and a pair of heavy vent canons to burst surplus energy onto any survivors.
